hide() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
Hides the ring -- used when the mouse moves off any valid cell.
hit(int, int) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.ShotMark3D
Extra hit marker (small flame) shown above a cell where a ship was hit.
HIT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.board.CellState
Shot at, hit part of a ship, but that ship hasn't been fully sunk yet.
HIT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.player.ShotResult
The shot damaged part of a ship that isn't fully destroyed yet; the shooter fires again.
HIT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.SegmentState
The segment was hit by an enemy shot.
hitMarks - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
hitMaterial() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
 
hitSegments - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
 
HORIZONTAL - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Orientation
The ship extends along increasing columns, on a single row.
HOVER_Y - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
 
HoverMarker3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
A white ring that hovers just above a board cell, used to highlight whichever cell the mouse is currently over.
HoverMarker3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
Builds the ring mesh and starts it hidden, mouse-transparent, and floating just above the water plane.
hull - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
HULL_BASE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
HULL_BASE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
HULL_BASE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
HULL_CENTER_Y - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Y of the hull's centerline; everything else is measured from here.
HULL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
 
HULL_MID_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
HULL_MID_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
HULL_MID_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
HULL_SLICES - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Number of "printed" cross-section slices used to shape each hull layer along X.
HULL_SLICES - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Number of "printed" cross-section slices used to taper the hull along X.
HULL_SLICES - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Number of "printed" cross-section slices used to shape the hull along X.
human - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
 
HUMAN - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.player.Turn
The human player is choosing where to fire next.
HumanBoardListener() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController.HumanBoardListener
 
HumanPlayer - Class in com.example.battleship.model.player
The human player.
HumanPlayer(String) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.player.HumanPlayer
 
HuntShootingStrategy - Class in com.example.battleship.model.player
A smarter alternative to RandomShootingStrategy: while there is no damaged-but-not-yet-sunk ship on the board, it behaves exactly like plain random targeting.
HuntShootingStrategy() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
Uses a new, non-seeded Random.
HuntShootingStrategy(Random) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
